name: Depth to Normal
author: automata-rtx
description: Depth to Normal — reconstructs a per-pixel world-space surface normal from the scene depth buffer and publishes it as a service other mods can consume (ambient occlusion, shadows, reflections, outlines). It has no settings of its own. The depth→normal reconstruction (atyuwen's 5-tap method) is adapted from Encounter's ao_mod demo (Bevy Engine SSAO / Intel XeGTAO); see res/licenses.
